summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PITCH'D iteration 3 with major backend rewrite (OpenAI SDK, dual-mode prompts) and font changes (Syne → Bebas Neue). All tests passed.
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 major changes all verified working: 1) Backend rewritten with OpenAI SDK (gpt-4o model) with dual-mode prompts - script mode (>=1000 chars) uses Dr. Scrypto prompt, concept mode (<1000 chars) uses development exec prompt. 2) All fonts changed from Syne to Bebas Neue - verified via computed styles on logo, heading, button, and title cards. 3) API returns parsed JSON directly with new fields: genre, subgenres, tone, time_period, setting. 4) PDF export works correctly (downloads file, not print dialog). 5) Promo modal with PITCHD25 code appears after export.

font_verification.heading_bebas_neue: PASS - 'Your story. Worth the room.' uses Bebas Neue
font_verification.button_bebas_neue: PASS - 'Develop the Pitch' button uses Bebas Neue
font_verification.title_cards_bebas_neue: PASS - All title cards (36px) use Bebas Neue

backend_api.missing_text_validation: PASS - Returns 400 for missing text field
backend_api.concept_mode: PASS - Text <1000 chars returns valid JSON with all fields
backend_api.script_mode: PASS - Text >=1000 chars returns valid JSON with all fields

frontend_e2e.script_mode_flow: PASS - 2895 chars → generate → results with titles, loglines, taglines, synopsis
